name: codex-pro
description: Advanced Codex integration for Claude Code — drop-in upgrade for openai/codex-plugin-cc with ensemble pattern, hard timeouts, circuit breaker, and structured observability. v0.5: adds /codex-pro:config (read-only consumer, profile-based config mechanism); review v0.3 / rescue v0.2 / adversarial-review v0.3 become profile-aware (model / effort / max_time / focus_default resolved from ~/.codex-pro/profile.yaml global + project .codex-pro/profile.yaml; hardcoded defaults keep 100% backward compatibility). Fulfils Design constraint #5 partial landing.
